## Outcome

Describe the user-visible result and why the change is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Documentation updated where needed
- [ ] Ruff, mypy, Pyright, policy, generation, and pytest checks pass
- [ ] Android behavior was tested when the change affects device automation
- [ ] Every commit includes a DCO `Signed-off-by` line

## Compatibility

Describe breaking changes, Appium/Android compatibility effects, and any follow-up work.
